channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Nanawati: The Last Negotiation | Ep 6 – Afghanistan
item.description: Under Taliban rule, one woman struggles to negotiate with the men limiting the lives of Afghan women.

item.title: Why Israel could still derail the Iran-US deal
item.description: Trump called it a historic deal. But with nuclear talks and Israel all unresolved, what did either side actually win?

item.title: Trump calls Modi a ‘killer’ and an ‘angel’
item.description: President Donald Trump praised Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a “killer” and an “angel" at the G7 in France.

item.title: Northern Lebanon airport revival brings economic hope for the region
item.description: Rene Mouawad Airport to serve Istanbul, Dubai, and Mersin as part of plans to revitalise northern Lebanon's economy.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Day six
item.description: Al Jazeera’s @RahulP_Journo has your #FIFAworldcup26 day 6 recap.

item.title: Tehran War Diary: Shooting war at home
item.description: An internationally acclaimed photojournalist in Iran turns his lens on his own city, as Tehran comes under bombardment.

item.title: Telegram challenges India app ban, calls move unconstitutional
item.description: India blocked Telegram after exam paper leaks, prompting the legal challenge.

item.title: Russian artist and outspoken Putin critic shot dead days after protest
item.description: Russian artist was shot dead in Poland just three days after a performance protest in Berlin near the Russian embassy.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz reopens: But can ships’ safety be assured?
item.description: Shipping operators and insurers prefer to wait and watch from a distance for now.

item.title: Israeli settlers set fire to a mosque in the occupied West Bank
item.description: Israeli settlers have vandalised and burned a mosque in the occupied West Bank village of Jaljulia, north of Ramallah.

item.title: ‘He wanted to burn me alive’: 92-year-old recounts West Bank settler attack
item.description: Settlers target mosques and homes amid escalating attacks in the occupied West Bank, increasing fear among Palestinians.

item.title: UK orders Google to improve transparency for search services
item.description: British businesses complain Google's current ranking practices are neither fair nor transparent.

item.title: LIVE: Portugal vs DR Congo – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow the build-up, analysis and live text commentary of the Group K clash between Ronaldo's Portugal and DR Congo.

item.title: Trump accuses Obama of ‘bribing’ Iran in 2015 nuclear deal at G7 summit
item.description: US President Donald Trump has accused his predecessor Barack Obama of ‘bribing’ Iran to agree to the 2015 nuclear deal.

item.title: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon continue despite US-Iran deal
item.description: There has been a reduction in violence since the US-Iran agreement was announced, but attacks have not stopped.

item.title: South Africa play Czechia, seek first World Cup win after Mexico defeat
item.description: After losing their opening group matches, both teams need a victory to keep knockout hopes alive.

item.title: China pledges new humanitarian aid packages for Lebanon and Iran
item.description: China pledges new humanitarian aid packages for Lebanon and Iran.

item.title: Inside Canada’s ‘troubling’ shift on migrant, refugee rights
item.description: Experts say Canada 'closing the doors' as socioeconomic issues upend decades-long consensus on immigration.

item.title: Taiwan accuses Kenya of deporting conference delegates on China’s behalf
item.description: First African nation to host the global oceans conference defends deportations, saying it 'recognises only one China'.

item.title: Pro-Palestine solidarity on display at the 2026 World Cup
item.description: Fans from Algeria to Bosnia are making sure the Palestinian cause gets attention during the World Cup.

item.title: Israel takes control of Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque: What this means
item.description: Palestinians controlled planning and construction in the entire West Bank city under the 1997 Hebron Agreement.

item.title: Zidane Iqbal: The footballer who gave Pakistan its first World Cup moment
item.description: Manchester-born midfielder Zidane Iqbal becomes the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a World Cup.

item.title: Floyd Mayweather faces theft charges for using bad cheque to buy a watch
item.description: Boxing legend allegedly wrote the cheque on New Year's Eve 2024 and could face up to 20 years in jail if found guilty.

item.title: Why UK’s Makerfield by-election matters far beyond one parliamentary seat
item.description: Thursday's contest could pave the way for Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to challenge Keir Starmer's premiership.

item.title: UK’s Starmer says Russian warship’s warning shots in Channel ‘reckless’
item.description: Russia says shots were fired to divert a yacht outside the UK's territorial waters.
